You need to know both the contract number and plan benefit package identification number 
(variable called PLAN_ID_YY) to identify the specific plan benefit package offered to beneficiaries 
for the particular year (YY). 

This variable corresponds with the CONTRACT_NAME variable in the plan base file for the year,
